# ClickCoach

> ClickCoach is a web-based coaching operating system for professional coaches, solo practices, multi-coach firms, and certification programs.

ClickCoach helps coaches run sessions, assign homework, track client progress, manage a client portal, handle billing, offer courses, send broadcasts, use AI summaries, and produce proof of coaching outcomes from one login.

Primary website: https://clickcoach.io/

Key pages:
- Product overview: https://clickcoach.io/
- Features: https://clickcoach.io/features/
- Pricing: https://clickcoach.io/pricing/
- For coaches, teams, and certification programs: https://clickcoach.io/for-coaches/
- Founder story: https://clickcoach.io/about/
- Testimonials and proof: https://clickcoach.io/testimonials/
- Contact, support, affiliates, and API inquiries: https://clickcoach.io/contact/
- Join / checkout: https://clickcoach.io/join/
- Privacy policy: https://clickcoach.io/privacy/
- Terms of service: https://clickcoach.io/terms/

Core offer:
- ClickCoach Access is $497 per coach per year.
- Includes full platform access, unlimited clients, and a 30-day money-back guarantee.
- Teams plans are available for coaching companies and certification programs.

Primary audience:
- Professional coaches who want fewer disconnected tools.
- Coaches who need proof of client progress and transformation.
- Solo coaches who want an operating system for sessions, homework, billing, notes, and client accountability.
- Multi-coach practices and certification programs that need consistent delivery across coaches.

Founder:
- ClickCoach was built by Mitch Russo after 25 years coaching founders and executives.
- Mitch Russo previously founded, scaled, and sold a software company, managed 50+ coaches for Tony Robbins and Chet Holmes, and has published six books on coaching, certification, and licensing.

Support:
- Email: support@clickcoach.io
